reviews.review_description: This is honestly frustrating. You pay for a subscription and only get about 100 minutes, and then they ask $30 for just 30 more minutes? That’s insanely overpriced, especially when the video quality is still blurred.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback—we truly appreciate it. Our team is working on improving pricing and video quality, and a better update will be available soon.
If you’re happy with our support and upcoming improvements, we’d greatly appreciate a 5-star review.

reviews.review_description: 20$ for just 10mints. Most expensive vr experience in the whole world.

reviews.review_title: Great App.. Price is the problem
reviews.review_description: Annual subscription price on the app is $99.99 but when you click to pay the price shows $399 ☹️ before applying the offer code. Please address this discrepancy and make this affordable.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback—we truly appreciate it. Our team is working on improving pricing, and a better update will be available soon.

reviews.review_title: Excellent but price and time limit both
reviews.review_description: Excellent Outstanding but price is too high for 30 min and 60 min for day at lease take price and remove time frame, in my family there are 12 person + family friend and they want to watch but your time line is disturbing us. Or extend time for 1 day.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We would definitely work on the pricing. You can call us on +916232105161 for offers.

reviews.review_title: Big issue with Download every time
reviews.review_description: Losing interest by downloading  videos every time , will be an issue, sometimes the network is not available and downloading time is also high, Please rectify the issue,
